prismatic_dice.name: Evolution
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provide 2 points, and doubles ATK/DEF

prismatic_dice.name: Destiny
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 1/3/6/12/16 points and gains Destined. Destined: Dice with these effect must be selected for use after being rolled.

prismatic_dice.name: Revenge
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available when attacking after taking a total of 25 DMG

prismatic_dice.name: Doctor's Advice
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available anytime (Default: Available when HP is 10 or less)
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 1/2/3/4/6 points and heals 1/2/3/4/6 HP. Heal: Restores a specified amount of HP.

prismatic_dice.name: Last Words
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available when HP is 8 or less
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provide 1/2/4 points, and doubles ATK/DEF

prismatic_dice.name: Repeater
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available when attacking after selecting Dice Face 4 a total of 2 times
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 4 points and gains Combo this turn. Combo: Performs 1 additional attack based on the current Attack.

prismatic_dice.name: Cactus
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 4/5/6/7/8/9 points, and gains Counter this turn. Counter: When attacked, if your DEF is higher, deals DMG to the attacker equal to the difference.

prismatic_dice.name: Miracle
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available when attacking after selecting Dice Face 1 a total of 9 times

prismatic_dice.name: Loan
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 2/3/4 points, and gains 2/3/4 stacks of Overload. Overload: When attacking, gains bonus ATK equal to the number of stacks. However, when defending, takes DMG equal to 50% of the number of stacks.

prismatic_dice.name: Astral Shield
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 1 point, and gains Forcefield this turn. Forcefield: When active, takes no DMG from general attacks.

prismatic_dice.name: Oath
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 4/6 points, and gains Unyielding this turn. Unyielding: While active, always keeps 1 HP.

prismatic_dice.name: Big Red Button
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Available when attacking during or after turn 5
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 6/8 points, and immediately triggers Last Stand. Last Stand: Reduces HP to 1 and gains a point bonus equal to the HP amount reduced.

prismatic_dice.name: Sorcerer
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 4/6 points, and gains Hack this turn. Hack: Before the end of the turn, turns your opponent's selected die with the highest value into a 2. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

prismatic_dice.name: Heartbeat
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 9 points, and gains 1 Prismatic Dice use

prismatic_dice.name: Berserker
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 8/12 points, and gains 2/3 stacks of Thorns. Thorns: Before the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks. This effect is removed at the end of the turn.

prismatic_dice.name: Gambler
prismatic_dice.use_condition: Only available during the first 4 turns

prismatic_dice.name: Magic Bullet
prismatic_dice.effect: After it is selected, provides 3/5/7 points, and immediately deals 3 Instant Damage. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.
